creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 191664
svn diff for x11-fm/pcmanfm

Like the title says;
I use this, and a recent (fresh) install indicated that
it was unmaintained. So I'd like to look after it.

Please find the svn diff attached, to accomplish this.
I'm also taking x11/libfm, and x11/menu-cache. As they
are both a part of x11-fm/pcmanfm, and are also
unmaintained.

Thanks!

--Chris
